prompt: Logo wordmark on pure white (#FFFFFF) background. The text 'MM AGENCY.' in a single horizontal line, all uppercase, all in solid black (#000000). CRITICAL: The ENTIRE text uses ONE SINGLE typeface — a bold, blocky, geometric extended sans-serif like Microgramma Extended Bold. Every letter is the SAME font, same weight, same style. Wide rectangular letterforms, thick strokes, sharp 90-degree corners, minimal counter space. Tight letter-spacing. The period dot at the end is bright yellow (#FAFA00). No icon, no symbol. Pure heavy typography centered on white. Vector quality, crisp edges, completely flat.
negative_prompt: black background, dark background, icon, symbol, graphic, 3D, gradient, shadow, glow, neon, complex, busy, decorative, serif, script, handwritten, thin lines, light weight, different fonts for different words, mixed typefaces, rounded font, realistic photo, photography, human, blur, low quality, pixelated, noise, grunge
